controlnexus.title: Control Nexus
enterText: You are in the central control nexus. This is the heart of the multiverse navigation system. Strange lights pulse from crystalline structures embedded in the walls.

environment.name: tactical display
environment.description: A holographic tactical display flickering with multiverse node data.

environment.name: control console
environment.description: A sleek console with touch-sensitive panels awaiting input.

objectiveHints: That suspiciously blue button is begging to be pressed.

controlroom.title: Control Room
enterText: A high-tech control room with banks of monitors and control panels. The air hums with electronic activity.

environment.name: tactical display
environment.description: It shows a branching lattice of possible realities.

environment.name: systems console
environment.description: Scrolling diagnostics confirm all subsystems nominal.

crossing.title: The Crossing
enterText: A mystical crossroads where multiple pathways converge. Energy crackles in the air, and you can sense multiple destinations beckoning.

gorstanhub.title: Gorstan Hub
enterText: The central hub of Gorstan, a mystical realm of ancient power. Mist swirls around stone archways leading to various parts of this magical land.

londonhub.title: London Hub
enterText: A bustling intersection in modern London. The familiar sounds of city life surround you - traffic, conversations, and the distant chime of Big Ben.

newyorkhub.title: New York Hub
enterText: The heart of Manhattan. Skyscrapers tower above you, yellow cabs honk in the distance, and the energy of the city that never sleeps pulses all around.

faepalacerhianonsroom.title: Rhianon\
enterText: You enter the private chamber of Rhianon, one of the most powerful Fae nobles. The room is a study in elegant contrasts - walls of deepest midnight blue are studded with points of light that shift like captured stars, while furniture of pale silver wood seems to glow with its own inner radiance.

ravenchamber.title: R.A.V.E.N. Chamber
enterText: You step into a narrow chamber humming with quiet static. Cracked screens line the walls, some looping nonsense glyphs, others frozen mid-boot.

anothermazeroom.title: Another Maze Room
enterText: You are in another room in the maze. It looks much like the others.

mazeroom.title: Maze Room
enterText: You are in a nondescript room within the maze. The walls are plain and the air is still.

stillamazeroom.title: Still a Maze Room
enterText: You are in yet another room of the maze. The sameness is almost dizzying.

greasystoreroom.title: Burger Joint Storeroom
enterText: You step into a cramped storeroom behind the burger joint kitchen. The air is thick with the lingering aromas of cooking oil and spices, and everything seems to have a subtle sheen of grease.

ancientsroom.title: Ancients
enterText: You enter a quiet chamber set apart from the infinite shelves of the Ancients

glitchrealm.title: Glitchrealm
enterText: You phase into Glitchrealm. Reality wobbles appreciatively.
objectiveHints: The coin feels heavier here. Try using it.

artifactChamber.title: Artifact Chamber
enterText: A hidden chamber filled with ancient runes and a glowing pedestal at its center. The artifact rests here, waiting for a worthy challenger.

spireCourtyard.title: Spire Courtyard
enterText: A vast open courtyard at the base of the Spire, surrounded by ancient ruins. The air is thick with tension, as if the world itself is holding its breath.

mazeZone_mazeroom.title: Endless Corridors
enterText: Corridors fold into themselves. Your steps echo back.

mazeZone_stillamazeroom.title: Endless Corridors
enterText: Corridors fold into themselves. Your steps echo back.

liminalhub.title: The Liminal Hub
enterText: A vast, circular chamber stretches out before you, its walls shimmering with a pearlescent, shifting light that defies easy description. The floor is a seamless expanse of polished obsidian, reflecting the ethereal glow from above.
